zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Murdac於1146年出生在英國奧可福爾鮑頓 波格斯時，他的父親Ralph Murdac51歲，母親Beatrice de Chesney32歲。他於大約1188年與Eva Grey結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1189年在英國被列為itinerant justice。他去世於1198年9月30日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾布萊克 布爾頓享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Murdac于1146年出生在英国奧可福爾鮑頓 波格斯时，他的父亲Ralph Murdac51岁，母亲Beatrice de Chesney32岁。他于大约1188年与Eva Grey结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1189年在英国被列为itinerant justice。他去世于1198年9月30日在英国英格兰奧可福爾布萊克 布爾頓享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Murdac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Murdoch
meanings: Scottish: from an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal names Muireadhach ‘mariner’, Murchadh ‘sea-warrior’, and Muircheartach ‘sea-ruler’, the first element in each being muir ‘sea’. The personal name was introduced into Yorkshire and Normandy by Norsemen from Ireland as early as the 10th century. The surname in post-Conquest medieval England usually belongs to Norman families.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Murdac was born in 1146, in Broughton Poggs, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Ralph Murdac, was 51 and his mother, Beatrice de Chesney, was 32. He married Eva Grey about 1188. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. In 1189, at the age of 43, his occupation is listed as itinerant justice in England. He died on 30 September 1198, in Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Murdac est né en 1146, à Broughton Poggs, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Murdac, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Chesney, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Eva Grey environ 1188. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. En 1189, à l’âge de 43 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est itinerant justice à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 30 septembre 1198, à Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, England, Uni: Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Murdac 1146 in Broughton Poggs, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Murdac 51 und seine Mutter Beatrice de Chesney 32. Er hat um 1188 Eva Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. 1189, als er 43 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als itinerant justice in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. September 1198 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Murdac è nato il nel 1146 nel Broughton Poggs, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Murdac, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice de Chesney, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Eva Grey circa 1188. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Nel 1189, all'età di 43 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come itinerant justice nel England. Morì il 30 settembre 1198, nel Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Murdac(이)가 1146년 영국 스퍼드실르 브루그h턴 포그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Murdac(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Chesney(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1188년 Eva Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1189년, 43세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 itinerant justice이었다. 그는 1198년 9월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 블랙 부르턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Murdac nasceu em 1146, em Broughton Poggs, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Murdac, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Chesney, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Eva Grey aproximadamente 1188. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Em 1189, com 43 anos, sua profissão aparece como itinerant justice em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1198, em Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Murdac родился в 1146 г. в местности броугтон погс, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Murdac было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Chesney, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva Grey около 1188 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. В 1189 году, в возрасте 43 лет,  он работал по профессии itinerant justice в местности Англия. Он умер 30 сентября 1198 г. в местности блэкк буртон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Murdac nació en 1146, en Broughton Poggs, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Murdac, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Beatrice de Chesney, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Eva Grey aproximadamente 1188. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. En 1189, a la edad de 43 años, su ocupación registrada era itinerant justice en Inglaterra. Murió el 30 de septiembre de 1198, en Black Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
